-  "notes": "AI triage (gemini): The '14 parallel RDP connections' limit is likely due to client-side resource exhaustion (e.g., memory, GDI objects) when mRemoteNG hosts multiple instances of the RDP ActiveX control, which is a common limitation of the underlying Microsoft RDP component.\nApproach: Guide the user to investigate client-side resource usage (memory, GDI/User objects) and optimize RDP connection settings (lower color depth, disable bitmap caching, reduce resolution) to mitigate resource consumption. +  "notes": "AI triage (gemini): The '14 parallel RDP connections' limit is likely due to client-side resource exhaustion (e.g., memory, GDI objects) when mRemoteNG hosts multiple instances of the RDP ActiveX control, which is a common limitation of the underlying Microsoft RDP component.\nApproach: Guide the user to investigate client-side resource usage (memory, GDI/User objects) and optimize RDP connection settings (lower color depth, disable bitmap caching, reduce resolution) to mitigate resource consumption. For future enhancements, explore alternative RDP components or hosting strategies to potentially alleviate this limitation."
 }

-  "notes": "AI triage (claude): Data loss bug: when MySQL database fails to load, the existing connection configuration is erased instead of preserved, causing users to lose their connections.\nApproach: Wrap the database load in a try/catch that aborts the merge/overwrite step on failure, preserving the existing in-memory configuration rather than clearing it before the error is surfaced.",

-    "input_tokens": 3,

-    "cost_usd": 0.181785
-  },
-  "impl_failed": true
+  "last_synced": "2026-02-24T22:01:02Z",
+  "notes": "AI triage (claude): Data loss bug: when MySQL database fails to load, the existing connection configuration is erased instead of preserved, causing users to lose their connections.\nApproach: Wrap the database load in a try/catch that aborts the merge/overwrite step on failure, preserving the existing in-memory configuration rather than clearing it before the error is surfaced."
 }

 }

 }

-  "notes": "AI triage (claude): Verified ObjectDisposedException crash when closing SSH connection window — protocol fires Prot_Event_Closed after ConnectionWindow is already disposed, causing unhandled exception that terminates the app.\nApproach: In Prot_Event_Closed, add IsDisposed/Disposing guard before Control.Invoke so the callback is silently ignored if the window was already disposed during closure.",

+  "notes": "AI triage (claude): Verified ObjectDisposedException crash when closing SSH connection window — protocol fires Prot_Event_Closed after ConnectionWindow is already disposed, causing unhandled exception that terminates the app.\nApproach: In Prot_Event_Closed, add IsDisposed/Disposing guard before Control.Invoke so the callback is silently ignored if the window was already disposed during closure."
 }
